member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldClass.Unrepresentable
member.summary: The storage representation cannot hold the domain concept.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldClass.Narrowed
member.summary: The storage representation is narrower than the domain representation, risking data loss.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldClass.Widened
member.summary: The storage representation is wider than the domain representation (e.g. string vs varchar).

member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldClass.Lossless
member.summary: The storage representation perfectly matches the domain representation.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldClass
member.summary: Classifies the fidelity of mapping a domain field to/from a storage field.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.Refined`2
member.summary: A refined type containing a value that has been proven to satisfy the predicate 'P.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.Lattice`1
member.summary: A closed six-constructor bounded complemented lattice for query formulation.
